_comment: Per tools/workstream-handoffs/render-toolchain-containerization-handoff_2026-05-18.md §4.4 + tools/scripts/README.md, the SessionStart hook below installs the canonical render toolchain in Anthropic remote-container sessions (gated on CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE=true; local laptop sessions use Docker via Colima instead). The recommended primary mechanism is to configure tools/scripts/install-render-toolchain.sh as the environment's web-UI setup script — that benefits from env-cache snapshots and avoids per-session install latency. This hook is a belt-and-suspenders fallback for cases where the UI setup script is not yet configured.
